summary: Mobile UI fixes verification completed. Landing page header with login button is visible. Mobile wallet deposit/withdraw buttons work. Portfolio detail invest button is visible. Dashboard is compact. However, found a BUG: 'Создать заявку' button in deposit modal is partially hidden behind bottom navigation bar.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Создать заявку' button is partially hidden behind bottom navigation bar. Button position: top=740, bottom=788. Bottom nav position: top=747. The button overlaps with bottom nav by ~41px.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Add padding-bottom to modal content or use pb-20 class to account for bottom navigation height

passed_tests: Landing page - Header visible on mobile with 'Вход' (Login) button
Landing page - Mobile menu button (hamburger) visible
Login flow - Email/password authentication works
Mobile Dashboard - Loads correctly with user greeting
Mobile Dashboard - Balance card with deposit/withdraw buttons visible
Mobile Dashboard - Stats (invested capital, expected profit) visible
Mobile Dashboard - Active contracts section visible
Mobile Dashboard - Income history chart visible
Mobile Dashboard - Scroll ratio 2.39 (reasonable for content)
Mobile Wallet - Page loads with balance cards
Mobile Wallet - 'Пополнить' (Deposit) button visible and clickable
Mobile Wallet - 'Вывести' (Withdraw) button visible and clickable
Mobile Wallet - Deposit modal opens correctly
Mobile Wallet - Modal has account number and bank details
Mobile Wallet - Currency selector works
Mobile Wallet - Amount input works
Mobile Portfolio Detail - Page loads with portfolio info
Mobile Portfolio Detail - 'Инвестировать' (Invest) button visible at bottom
Mobile Portfolio Detail - Investment terms selector works
Mobile Portfolio Detail - Tabs (Overview, Calculator, Assets) work
API /api/health - Returns healthy status
API /api/auth/login - Returns session_token, user_id, role
action_items: FIX: Add bottom padding to deposit modal in MobileWallet.js to prevent 'Создать заявку' button from being hidden behind bottom navigation. Suggested: change 'pb-safe' to 'pb-24' or add 'mb-20' to the button container.
critical_code_review_comments: MobileWallet.js line 268: Modal has 'pb-safe' class but this doesn't account for the 65px bottom navigation bar. The button at y=740 overlaps with bottom nav at y=747.
Consider using a fixed bottom button inside the modal similar to MobilePortfolioDetail.js which uses 'fixed bottom-20' positioning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI fixes mostly working. Landing page header shows login button. Dashboard and wallet pages have visible deposit/withdraw buttons. Portfolio detail has visible invest button. One bug found: deposit modal 'Создать заявку' button is hidden behind bottom navigation bar on 375x812 viewport.

landing_page_mobile.header_visible: WORKING - Header with logo, login button, and hamburger menu visible
landing_page_mobile.login_button: WORKING - 'Вход' button visible at top=16, left=260

mobile_wallet.deposit_modal: PARTIAL - Modal opens but 'Создать заявку' button hidden behind bottom nav

mobile_portfolio_detail.invest_button: WORKING - 'Инвестировать' button visible at bottom with fixed positioning

mobile_dashboard.compactness: WORKING - Scroll ratio 2.39 is reasonable for dashboard content
mobile_dashboard.balance_card: WORKING - Shows available balance with deposit/withdraw buttons

deposit_modal_button_hidden.description: 'Создать заявку' button in deposit modal is partially hidden behind bottom navigation bar
deposit_modal_button_hidden.root_cause: pb-safe class doesn't account for bottom navigation height
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe that 'Создать заявку' button is hidden behind bottom nav
